articles.title: Building real-world on-device AI with LiteRT and NPU
articles.snippet: LiteRT is a production-ready framework designed to help mobile developers unlock the power of Neural Processing Units (NPUs), overcoming the performance and battery limitations of traditional CPU or GPU processing. By providing a unified API that abstracts away hardware complexities, it allows industry leaders like Google Meet and Epic Games to deploy sophisticated AI models for real-time video, animation, and speech recognition with significantly higher efficiency. The platform further supports
articles.ai_summary: LiteRT is a new framework that enables mobile developers to leverage Neural Processing Units (NPUs) for efficient AI processing, enhancing applications like video and speech recognition. This innovation addresses performance and battery issues associated with traditional processing methods.
articles.why_it_matters: Empowers mobile developers to create more efficient AI applications.

articles.title: Anthropic cyberattack highlights how the modalities are becoming harder to contain
